assertions.assertion: Output uses AddGrpcClient<T>() to register the typed gRPC client with the downstream endpoint address
assertions.rationale: Code calls `AddGrpcClient<Greeter.GreeterClient>(o => { o.Address = new Uri("https://grpc.example.com"); })` on lines 29-32.

assertions.assertion: Output chains .AddUserAccessTokenHandler() on the gRPC client registration to attach user tokens automatically
assertions.rationale: No AddUserAccessTokenHandler() is chained. Tokens are manually retrieved via `httpContext.GetTokenAsync("access_token")` and passed as gRPC metadata.

assertions.assertion: Output includes or references AddOpenIdConnectAccessTokenManagement() as prerequisite for user token management
assertions.rationale: No AddOpenIdConnectAccessTokenManagement() call is present in the code.
